topic: Viewing and Editing Processed Monthly Salaries
summary: This feature allows you to view the processed salaries for a specific month and make ad-hoc, one-time adjustments to individual employee's salary components, such as adding advance recovery.
steps: Select the 'Year' and 'Month' for which you want to view salaries.
Click 'Go'. (Leaving other fields blank will display all employees for the selected month).
A list of employees with their processed salary details (payable days, gross salary, deduction, paid salary) will appear.
To view or edit a specific employee's salary, click the 'View' option corresponding to that employee.
The employee's complete salary structure for the month will open.
Make desired changes, such as adjusting 'Basic' salary, adding/removing earning/deduction heads, or entering an 'Advance Recovery' amount.
The system will automatically recalculate the 'Gross Salary', 'Deduction', and 'Paid Salary' amounts.
Enter 'Remarks' explaining the changes made (e.g., 'Advance Recovery added').
Click 'Save'. A pop-up will confirm that the changes have been saved.
business_rules: Any changes made here are specific to the processed salary for that particular month and do not alter the employee's underlying salary contract (template).
Entering 'Remarks' is mandatory for saving any changes to processed salaries.
important_notes: This section is for making one-time adjustments to a month's salary, not for permanent changes to an employee's contract.
The system provides a clear breakdown of gross, deduction, and paid salary after any modifications.
questions: How can I view the salaries processed for November 2025?
Can I add an advance deduction to an employee's salary after it has been processed?
What information is displayed in the salary summary?
Why do I need to add remarks when editing a processed salary?
Will changes made here affect the employee's future salary contracts?
related_topics: Creating and Managing Earning and Deduction Heads
